headline: PermissionDenied hook — capture auto-mode classifier denials

bullets: New `log-permission-denied.sh` — logs auto-mode classifier denials to invocations.jsonl for downstream analytics (deny count, classifier latency, reason histograms). Pure logger, no matcher — fires on all tool denials.
PermissionDenied handler added to `settings.template.json` — new projects get it wired automatically on sync.
